title: Pan-Seared Wagyu Steak with Zanzibari Pilaf
description: A flavorful and nutritious dish featuring pan-seared wagyu steak served with zanzibari pilaf. This recipe combines the rich taste of wagyu with the aromatic flavor of zanzibari spices.
instructions: Season the wagyu steak with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over high heat.
Sear the wagyu steak for 2-3 minutes per side, or until a nice crust forms.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook to desired doneness.
While the steak is cooking, heat the zanzibari pilaf according to package instructions.
Serve the wagyu steak with the zanzibari pilaf.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
